title: toddalia aculeata
intro: Toddalia aculeata, also known as the Giant Toddalia or Giant Monkey Face, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Toddalia aculeata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being.
